languages.text: [Обратиться к черепу в руках] "Нунциус, тебе не кажется, что твой коллега свихнулся?"
[Address the skull in your hands] "Nuncius, I believe your colleague has lost his mind, wouldn't you agree?"
languages.original_text: [Обратиться к черепу в руках] "Нунциус, тебе не кажется, что твой коллега свихнулся?"

languages.text: [Dirigirte al cráneo que sostienes] «Nuncius, creo que su colega ha perdido la cabeza, ¿verdad?».
languages.original_text: [Address the skull in your hands] "Nuncius, I believe your colleague has lost his mind, wouldn't you agree?"

traits.locale_text: [Dirigirte al cráneo que sostienes] «Nuncius, creo que su colega ha perdido la cabeza, ¿verdad?».

languages.text: 【对着手中的头骨说话】“努恩修斯，看来你的同僚已经疯了，你觉得呢？”
languages.original_text: [Address the skull in your hands] "Nuncius, I believe your colleague has lost his mind, wouldn't you agree?"

traits.locale_text: 【对着手中的头骨说话】“努恩修斯，看来你的同僚已经疯了，你觉得呢？”

languages.text: [Vous adresser au crâne entre vos mains] « Nuncius, je pense que votre collègue a perdu la tête. N'êtes-vous pas d'accord ? »
languages.original_text: [Address the skull in your hands] "Nuncius, I believe your colleague has lost his mind, wouldn't you agree?"

traits.locale_text: [Vous adresser au crâne entre vos mains] « Nuncius, je pense que votre collègue a perdu la tête. N'êtes-vous pas d'accord ? »

languages.text: [Ellerindeki kafatasına hitap et] "Nuncius, sanırım meslektaşın aklını kaçırmış. Sence de öyle değil mi?"
languages.original_text: [Address the skull in your hands] "Nuncius, I believe your colleague has lost his mind, wouldn't you agree?"

traits.locale_text: [Ellerindeki kafatasına hitap et] "Nuncius, sanırım meslektaşın aklını kaçırmış. Sence de öyle değil mi?"

languages.text: [Den Schädel in deinen Händen ansprechen] "Nuncius, ich glaube, Euer Kollege hat den Verstand verloren, findet Ihr nicht auch?"
languages.original_text: [Address the skull in your hands] "Nuncius, I believe your colleague has lost his mind, wouldn't you agree?"

traits.locale_text: [Den Schädel in deinen Händen ansprechen] "Nuncius, ich glaube, Euer Kollege hat den Verstand verloren, findet Ihr nicht auch?"

languages.text: [手にした頭蓋骨に向かって]、"ヌンシウス、あなたの同僚は正気を失っていると思いますが、そう思いませんか？"と言う。
languages.original_text: [Address the skull in your hands] "Nuncius, I believe your colleague has lost his mind, wouldn't you agree?"
